name: Crotched Mountain Golf Club
address: 740 2nd New Hampshire Turnpike N, Francestown, NH 03043
about: Crotched Mountain Golf Club is an 18-hole facility in the rolling hills of New Hampshire, featuring the front nine designed by legendary architect Donald Ross. The club offers a combination of a traditional outdoor course and indoor high-definition golf simulators available during the winter season. It operates with a full-service pro shop and a driving range for practice, and includes a classic New England restaurant and tavern. The venue hosts golf outings, leagues, weddings, and other special events, providing a comprehensive golf and social experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Donald Ross designed course offering a classic New England golf experience
High-definition simulators available for winter play and practice
Full-service pro shop with all necessary golf equipment and apparel
Toll Booth Tavern provides dining options for post-round relaxation
Scenic views of the surrounding Monadnock region

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant 'Toll Booth Tavern' offering classic New England cuisine and custom catering for events
Full bar service available at Toll Booth Tavern

simulator_hardware.notes: Multiple high-definition golf simulators for winter season play and leagues

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators or play the course.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. The facility has a full-service restaurant and tavern on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole play typically takes 4-5 hours, depending on pace of play and course conditions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and offers junior golf programs and family-friendly dining options.
